title: Chantal Arsenault
content:
People.ContactEmail charsenault@mtiplus.ca
Chantal Arsenault is a partner in the MT>i plus immigration practice in Montreal. She has been practising in immigration law and professional mobility since 1995, providing advice on immigration issues to small and medium-sized companies as well as large international corporations. Known for her proactive approach, she accompanies her clients in their projects to bring foreign workers to Canada. Her clients span a wide range of industries, including technology, entertainment, sports, food service, pharmaceutical and manufacturing.
Ms. Arsenault works with clients across Canada and the United States in French and English.
- The North America Relocation Law (Carswell): The Quebec Immigration System, December 2014-2016 (yearly updates)
- A Practical Guide to Provincial Nominee Programs in Canadian Immigration Law (Carswell): Immigration in the Province of Quebec, December 2014-2016 (yearly updates)
